level_signals: Expected to set clear direction and own strategy + execution
Cross-functional leadership across engineering, ops, compliance, legal, finance

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of product management experience, preferably in fintech, financial services, or a similarly regulated, data-intensive environment
must_haves.qualifier: preferably in fintech, financial services, or a similarly regulated, data-intensive environment

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Demonstrated ability to own a feature or product area end-to-end
Strong customer instincts: you can identify the right problems to solve, prioritize confidently, and articulate what "done" looks like for our members
Enough technical fluency to have credible conversations with engineers about system architecture, trade-offs, and feasibility
Clear written and oral communication: you write quality documents, run focused meetings, and know how to tailor the message for engineers vs. leadership
Experience using data to drive decisions by pulling metrics, reading results, and iterating based on evidence
Ability to manage cross-functional stakeholders (engineering, ops, compliance, legal, finance) and keep execution on track within a multi-team environment

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in lending, loan servicing, payments, or financial services operations
Familiarity with third-party servicer integrations or complex vendor relationships alongside product work
Exposure to compliance adjacent product work: fair lending, regulatory reporting, or audit readiness
Comfort with SQL or self-serve data analysis tools to diagnose borrower behavior and product outcomes
Experience working on legacy system modernization or platform migration initiatives

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska

scope.surface: Multi-product loan servicing platform covering post-loan funding experience for SoFi lending products
scope.business_model: B2C financial services / national bank — consumer lending and servicing
core_responsibilities: Build and scale multi-product servicing platform to meet member and business needs
Partner with engineering, research, data science, design, legal, operations and business stakeholders to bring new capabilities to life
Ensure new capabilities deliver measurable results
Drive member engagement, cross-sell, and increase member lifetime value
Set clear direction in evolving spaces

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (loan servicing platform)
Role described as high-impact with direct effect on member financial outcomes
Cross-functional exposure across engineering, legal, ops, compliance, and finance — broad development opportunity
Company is a national bank with scale (millions of members)
'Nice to have' list is genuinely optional and well-separated from requirements
red_flags: Compensation range referenced but not disclosed in JD body — only 'listed below' with no actual numbers visible
Location type is unclear — no city, office, or explicit remote policy stated beyond Hawaii/Alaska exclusion
Visa sponsorship not mentioned at all
No posting date available to assess freshness
